title: [Chitinous Creations, Uncommon]
description: Miniature prototypes of the mechanical mounts are suspended high above their true-sized counterparts, the fine-grained mahogany platforms affixed with brass plaques written in a variety of languages.  Iron-hooked tools are neatly arranged across the back wall, the hammers and wrenches placed well within reaching distance to the walnut worktable nestled in the far corner.  Cylindrical pipes adorn the available wall space, the riveted pieces occasionally emitting tiny puffs of floral-scented steam.
